title: astragalus caprinus subsp. huetii
intro: Astragalus caprinus subsp. huetii is a sub-species of the astragalus plant, a type of legume commonly known as milkvetch or locoweed. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which are thought to be beneficial for a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Astragalus caprinus subsp. huetii are said to include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, improved cardiovascular health, and anti-cancer properties. Astragalus caprinus subsp. huetii is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with dried root or leaf being used in traditional herbal remedies.
